summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KOLOR STUDIO Activity Logging System - all backend APIs and frontend features working correctly with 100% backend success rate
passed_tests: Backend: Activities endpoint requires authentication (401 for no auth)
Backend: Activities returns 404 for invalid lead ID
Backend: GET /api/leads/:leadId/activities returns activities with proper structure
Backend: Activity includes id, type, description, createdAt, user fields
Backend: Add note endpoint requires authentication
Backend: Add note returns 404 for invalid lead
Backend: Add note requires content field (400 for empty/missing)
Backend: POST /api/leads/:leadId/notes creates NOTE_ADDED activity
Backend: Note activity includes user information
Backend: Status change (PATCH /api/leads/:id/status) logs STATUS_CHANGED activity
Backend: Multiple status changes log multiple activities
Backend: Activities are ordered by newest first
Backend: Lead creation logs an activity
Frontend: LeadDetailModal opens correctly when clicking lead card title
Frontend: Activity Timeline tab displays correctly with proper violet styling
Frontend: Activity Timeline is the default selected tab
Frontend: Add Note section with textarea and Save Note button present
Frontend: Note input has proper placeholder text
Frontend: Save Note button is disabled when input is empty
Frontend: Notes appear in activity timeline immediately after saving
Frontend: Note input clears after successful save
Frontend: Activity History shows activities with type labels and timestamps
Frontend: Activities display user attribution (by Emmanuel Obokoh)
Frontend: Lead Details tab shows client information and project details
Frontend: Tab switching between Activity Timeline and Lead Details works
critical_code_review_comments: Activity Timeline default tab selection is good UX decision
data-testid attributes properly added for testability
Activity type icons and colors well implemented for visual distinction
Time formatting (Just now, X min ago, X hours ago) enhances readability
seed_data_creation: Test notes were added via automated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Logging System is fully functional. LeadDetailModal opens from Kanban card clicks. Activity Timeline shows NOTE_ADDED and STATUS_CHANGED activities. Add Note feature works correctly. Status changes via API are logged. Previous leads without activities were created before the logging system was implemented.
